stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct with regards to Integrated Drive Generators (IDGs)? An IDG is a...

options.a: constant frequency generator which combines the CSD and the generator itself in a combined unit.
options.b: frequency wild generator which combines the CSD and the generator itself in a combined unit.
options.c: frequency wild generator which has an integrated GCU to provide a stable frequency output.
options.d: constant frequency generator with an integrated GCU; the GCU provides a stable frequency output.
